results.title: SEC Shortening Trade Settlement Cycle from T+2 to T+1
results.snippet: The SEC announced in 2023 that trade settlement will be reduced from T+2 to T+1 in 2024. The SEC set compliance with the new T+1 rule to begin on May 28, 2024.
